message:
fp-frame: add to_dict("series") orient returning Series-typed values

Widens DataFrame::to_dict so callers can get per-column Series objects
instead of the existing (label, Scalar) pair lists. Introduces a new
DataFrameDictResult enum with Mapping and Series variants plus
as_mapping()/as_series() accessors; to_dict now returns this enum in all
cases, and the existing string orients (dict, list, records, index,
split, tight) keep returning the Mapping variant unchanged.

The new "series" orient calls the pre-existing to_series_dict() helper
and wraps its BTreeMap<String, Series> in Mapping-agnostic form, giving
pandas-parity {column -> Series} behavior. Unsupported orient strings
continue to return FrameError::CompatibilityRejected verbatim.

Tests updated and added:
- All existing to_dict tests now unwrap via as_mapping() to assert on
  the Mapping variant (dict, records, tight, labels, and index orients)
- dataframe_to_dict_series asserts the new orient returns two Series
  whose names, values, and index pointer match the source DataFrame

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
